'''Gendal Delan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the founder of the [[Pendarran Warriors]], who fought alongside the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Gendal Delan was the leader of the organization called the [[Pendarran Warriors]], a military group allied with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He also sired a son, named [[Kolor Delan|Kolor]].<ref name="WBC" />

During the Clone Wars, a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy-wide]] conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Delan and the Pendarran Warriors fought against the Separatist threat alongside the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], his group participated in the [[Battle of Dreighton]], which also saw the involvement of the criminal organization [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]; all participants in the battle were wiped out over the period of a month, leaving no survivors.<ref name="WBC" />

At the end of the war, the Separatists were defeated, but [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], in truth a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], declared himself [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] of the newly-formed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In order to cement his rule, his first action was to issue [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a preset [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|command]] the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] were trained to follow, which resulted in the near destruction of the Jedi Order. As allies of the Jedi, the Pendarran Warriors were [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|targeted]] as well, and every last member, including Delan, was [[Death/Legends|killed]].<ref name="WBC" />

Many years later, Delan's son, Kolor, formed another armed organization, [[Pendarran's Revenge]], which was named after his father's group and often fought beside the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="WBC" />
